text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 58 

SLCTD_DRUG_SBSDY_AMT 

LABEL: Selected Drug Subsidy Amount at Point of Sale 

DESCRIPTION: This field is the reported subsidy amount that the plan sponsor advanced at point of sale for a selected 
drug in the initial coverage period. 

This field contains a positive dollar amount, or zero dollars when there is no selected drug subsidy 
applied at the POS.
